factors.comment: Soft factors layered on top of Elo. locker room: sum of news impacts x credibility (clamped +-5) -> up to +-locker_scale Elo. fake news: items with credibility < 0.7 are 'rumors' and additionally scaled by rumor_trust (0..1). pedigree: historical World Cup performance index 0-100 -> (pedigree-30)/70 x pedigree_scale Elo.

news.text: Rodrygo (ACL) out for the tournament; Estevao left out injured (talent loss counted in Player layer; residual morale only)
Timber left camp injured (groin); Xavi Simons out with ACL tear (talent loss counted in Player layer; residual morale only)
Mitoma (hamstring) misses final squad (talent loss counted in Player layer; residual morale only)
Fermin Lopez out (metatarsal fracture) (talent loss counted in Player layer; residual morale only)
Ekitike ruled out injured (talent loss counted in Player layer; residual morale only)

factors.player_scale_note: player availability/form handled by players.json layer

players.comment: Key players per squad. q = quality 1-10. st = fit|doubtful|injured|suspended. yel = tournament yellow cards (2 -> 1-match ban, wiped after QF). ban = remaining matches banned. stats accumulate during the tournament (min=minutes, g=goals, a=assists, pass=pass completion %, drib=dribble success %); null pass/drib = no data yet. Form is computed vs positional baselines and updates team strength dynamically.
players.league_comment: Club-league strength multiplier on player quality: q_eff = q x (1 + (coef-1) x league weight). Update 'lg' when players transfer.
players.inj_comment: inj = injury proneness 0 (iron) .. 3 (fragile); expected-absence Elo discount + raised for age>32. age as of June 2026.
players.exp_comment: wc = prior World Cups played (capped at 3 in model). mental = big-match temperament -2..+2, ONLY set where strongly documented (shootout records, documented finals performance); default 0 - 'clutch/choker' narratives are mostly noise. Star-dependence penalty replaces naive 'star gets marked' (already priced into Elo).

signals.comment: Referee assignments + betting-market signals. FIFA announced the full officials pool 2026-04-09 (52 referees); per-match assignments are published 1-2 days before kickoff and added here by the daily update. Referee stats are NEUTRAL descriptive data (cards/pens/upset rate in matches officiated) - small variance effect only, NOT a corruption score: per-referee samples are far too small to prove anything, and labeling individuals as fixers would be defamation. Market signals: large reported odds moves (sharp money) blended into match win expectancy; big model-vs-market divergence raises a watch flag - it means the market knows something (lineup, motivation, or in rare cases worse), not proof of fixing.
signals.assignment_practice: per-match referee assignments published 1-2 days before each match
